factors.summary: Demand is improving in many core markets.

evidence.text: Although we experienced rate pressures during the three months ended June 30, 2016, we also saw improving demand in many of our core markets, as evidenced by the increase in the volume of OEC on rent.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Demand improvement in core markets indicates positive momentum.

factors.summary: Pricing power is under pressure due to industry fleet expansion and competition.

evidence.text: The decreased rental rates reflected continued pressure from oil and gas and from Canada, and the impact of recent industry fleet expansion.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Pricing pressure from fleet expansion and competition suggests challenges.

factors.summary: Organic revenue growth is improving in the trench, power, and pump segment.

evidence.text: For the three months ended June 30, 2016, trench, power and pump equipment rentals increased 9.9 percent and average OEC increased 7.5 percent.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Revenue growth improvement in specific segments shows positive trend.

factors.summary: Unit volumes are increasing in the trench, power, and pump segment.

evidence.text: Year-over-year, trench, power and pump equipment rentals increased 9.3 percent and average OEC increased 9.1 percent.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Unit volume increases in key segments indicate positive growth.

factors.summary: The trench, power, and pump segment is growing faster than the general rentals segment.

evidence.text: For the three months ended June 30, 2016, trench, power and pump equipment rentals increased 9.9 percent and average OEC increased 7.5 percent.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Faster growth in specific segments compared to general rentals is positive.

factors.summary: Gross margins are decreasing due to pricing pressures and lower rental rates.

evidence.text: Total gross margin decreased 170 basis points as compared to the same period in 2015, primarily reflecting decreased gross margins from equipment rentals and sales of rental equipment.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Decreasing gross margins due to pricing pressures and lower rates indicate challenges.
